name: HR teams in small to medium-sized law firms using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee policy updates/month tool
description: For HR teams in small to medium-sized law firms using BambooHR, processing 5–15 employee policy updates/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking.

problem_solved: Staying updated with compliance changes and deadlines
